sections.paragraph:
(“height”), [Jattir], pr.n. of a town in the mountains of Judah, inhabited by the priests, Jos 15:48 21:14 1Sa 30:27 1Ch 6:42. [Perhaps ʾAttir, عتير Rob. it. 194.]

יתיר

Ch.-

(1) adj. very great, excellent, preeminent, Dan 2:31 5:12 , 14 .

(2) f. יַתִּירָה adv. abundantly, very, Dan 3:22 7:7 , 19 .
